ddls:
CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "ds" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "trend" REAL /* Estimated trend value */,
  "trend_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of trend estimation */,
  "trend_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of trend estimation */,
  "yhat_lower" REAL /* Lower bound for forecasted value */,
  "yhat_upper" REAL /* Upper bound for forecasted value */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the data (e.g., finance, retail, manufacturing) */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being measured (e.g., sales, inventory, customer demand) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "seasonality_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to seasonalities table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_seasonality_id FOREIGN KEY ("seasonality_id") REFERENCES seasonalities ("seasonality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonalities" (
  "seasonality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonality */,
  "seasonality_name" TEXT /* Name of the seasonal pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seasonal pattern */,
  "seasonal_period" INTEGER /* Length of the seasonality period */,
  "seasonal_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the seasonal pattern (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seasonality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding time series data */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "yhat" REAL /* Forecasted value */,
  "seasonal" REAL /* Estimated seasonal component */,
  "seasonal_lower" REAL /* Lower bound for seasonal estimation */,
  "seasonal_upper" REAL /* Upper bound for seasonal estimation */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast (e.g., 80%, 95%) */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., point, interval, distribution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON containing the parameters for the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "implementation" TEXT /* Implementation details of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_forecasts" (
  "model_forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model forecast association */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model used */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_forecasts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_forecasts_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_analysis" (
  "trend_analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the time series data */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the trend analysis */,
  "trend_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "trend_magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_data" (
  "data_source_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source association */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id")
)
